name: Grasshopper Cheese Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Cream cheese, at room temperature
2 ounces Semisweet chocolate, grated for garnish
recipeInstructions:
CHOCOLATE COOKIE CRUMB CRUST: Combine the chocolate cookie crumbs with melted butter and cinnamon. Toss and mix well. Press into the bottom and partially up the sides of the springform pan. Refrigerate while making the filling. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
CHEESE FILLING: Put the cream cheese in a mixing bowl and beat until light and soft. Add 3/4 cup of sugar and mix well. Stir in the green creme de menthe, creme de cacao, flour, and salt. Beat until the mixture is blended well. Add the egg yolks and sour cream, and beat until the batter is smooth and blended. Separate the egg whites and add 1/4 cup of remaining sugar. Beat until the whites form soft peaks. Gently fold the beaten whites into the cream-cheese mixture. Pour the batter into the crust. Bake for about 60 minutes in a preheated oven at 325°F, or until the cake has puffed and trembles slightly when shaken. A wooden skewer inserted in the cake should come out almost clean with just a trace of batter or moist crumbs on it. Do not overbake; the cake will settle and firm somewhat as it cools. Do not worry if the cake cracks as it bakes. Remove from the oven and cool completely. Refrigerate for at least 4 hours before garnishing. Sprinkle grated semisweet chocolate on top of the cake.
